calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2026 Text Ruling

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-08-2026 Continued To Jul-06-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court orders Attorney Donald Dowling to pay sanctions in the amount of $250.00 for failing to appear at the previous calling of this matter. An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Donald Dowling and Executor Wilmetta Mathews to appear on Jul-06-2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain the failure to appear and why an ex parte application to increase bond nor a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-04-2026 Continued To Jun-08-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Donald Dowling to appear on June 8, 2026, at 9;00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear, why executor should not be removed, why an ex parte petition to increase bond has not been filed, and why a petition to close the estate has not been filed. In addition, an Order to Show Cause will be issued to Attorney Donald Dowling to appear and explain why $250.00 in sanctions should not be imposed for his failure to appear. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Guitron. Matter not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-30-2026 Continued To May-04-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Continued To Mar-30-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-26-2026 Continued To Mar-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Donald Dowling for executor Wilmetta Matthews (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

Mr. Dowling reported that a petition for final distribution had not yet been filed due to the discovery of an additional asset consisting of securities requiring appraisal by the probate referee. Mr. Dowling stated that the appraisal was pending and that a petition for final distribution would be filed thereafter. Mr. Dowling further stated that one beneficiary had agreed to waive an accounting, while confirmation from the other beneficiary was still pending.

The Court noted that the executor's bond would need to be increased based on the additional assets.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to March 9, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-08-2025 Continued To Jan-26-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-04-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated August 28, 2021 is admitted to probate. Wilmetta W. Matthews is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $4,200,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for December 8, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is to be filed one week prior to the hearing date/ If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Santos. Not reported.
